title: centaurea surrejana
intro: Centaurea surrejana, also known as Balkan cornflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and tall stem. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as urinary tract problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea surrejana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in combination with other plants to create medicinal blends.
